name: tokovo-monorepo
description: AI-native studio for multi-device shows that happen inside phones.

scripts.dev:trace: TOKOVO_LOG_PROFILE=full TOKOVO_LOG_EVENTS=true TOKOVO_LOG_PERF=true TOKOVO_LOG_AUDIO=true turbo run dev --concurrency 30 --filter=web --filter=video-runner
scripts.dev:render:trace: TOKOVO_LOG_PROFILE=full TOKOVO_LOG_EVENTS=true TOKOVO_LOG_PERF=true TOKOVO_LOG_AUDIO=true turbo run dev --filter=@tokovo/render-service
scripts.render:doctor:trace: TOKOVO_LOG_PROFILE=full TOKOVO_LOG_EVENTS=true TOKOVO_LOG_PERF=true TOKOVO_LOG_AUDIO=true pnpm --filter @tokovo/render-service run doctor
scripts.render:smoke:trace: TOKOVO_LOG_PROFILE=full TOKOVO_LOG_EVENTS=true TOKOVO_LOG_PERF=true TOKOVO_LOG_AUDIO=true pnpm --filter @tokovo/render-service run smoke
scripts.render:episode:trace: TOKOVO_LOG_PROFILE=full TOKOVO_LOG_EVENTS=true TOKOVO_LOG_PERF=true TOKOVO_LOG_AUDIO=true pnpm --filter @tokovo/render-service run render
scripts.lint:ox: oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json apps/render-service apps/video-runner packages/core packages/episodes packages/react packages/renderer packages/background packages/devices packages/device-camera packages/apps-whatsapp
scripts.lint:release: eslint apps/render-service/src apps/video-runner/src packages/core/src packages/episodes/src/runtime packages/episodes/src/registry packages/episodes/src/types packages/episodes/src/stories packages/episodes/src/tests packages/apps-whatsapp/src packages/apps-x/src --max-warnings 0
scripts.test:phase1: pnpm --filter @tokovo/ir test && pnpm --filter @tokovo/dsl test && pnpm --filter @tokovo/compiler test && pnpm --filter @tokovo/episodes test
scripts.test:determinism:phase1: pnpm --filter @tokovo/ir test && pnpm --filter @tokovo/ir test && pnpm --filter @tokovo/dsl test && pnpm --filter @tokovo/dsl test && pnpm --filter @tokovo/compiler test && pnpm --filter @tokovo/compiler test && pnpm --filter @tokovo/episodes test && pnpm --filter @tokovo/episodes test
scripts.lint:unsafe:phase1: bash -lc 'if rg -n "as\\s+unknown\\s+as|as\\s+any\\b|:\\s*any\\b|<any>" packages/{ir,dsl,compiler,episodes}/src --glob '!**/*.test.ts' --glob '!**/__tests__/**'; then echo "Unsafe typing policy violated in phase1 targets"; exit 1; fi'
scripts.build:phase1: pnpm --filter @tokovo/ir build && pnpm --filter @tokovo/dsl build && pnpm --filter @tokovo/compiler build && pnpm --filter @tokovo/episodes build
scripts.ci:phase1: pnpm lint:unsafe:phase1 && pnpm test:phase1 && pnpm test:determinism:phase1 && pnpm build:phase1
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm validate && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.verify:release: pnpm lint:ox && pnpm lint:release && pnpm -s typecheck:solution && pnpm validate && pnpm --filter @tokovo/episodes run test -- --runInBand && pnpm build && pnpm render:smoke && pnpm verify:docs
scripts.verify:docs: pnpm typecheck:docs && pnpm test:docs && pnpm build:docs
